allow:
Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.development python -c "
import django
django.setup\(\)
from django.test import Client, override_settings
c = Client\(SERVER_NAME='localhost'\)
r = c.get\('/accounts/login/'\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
if r.status_code != 200:
    print\('Content:', r.content[:1000].decode\(errors='replace'\)\)
else:
    print\('OK - page rendered successfully'\)
    print\('First 200 chars:', r.content[:200].decode\(errors='replace'\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.development python -c "
import django
django.setup\(\)
from django.test import Client
c = Client\(SERVER_NAME='localhost'\)
r = c.get\('/accounts/login/'\)
print\('Login page status:', r.status_code\)
r2 = c.get\('/accounts/signup/'\)
print\('Signup page status:', r2.status_code\)
" 2>&1)
